title: That was then, this is now
subtitle: One of the cool things about European football is that it provides good evidence that high-income, high-ability individuals move in response to tax rates… That is from Jeremy Horpendahl, citing research by…Emanuel Saez. The post That was then, this is now appeared first on Marginal REVOLUTION .
contentHtml:
One of the cool things about European football is that it provides good evidence that high-income, high-ability individuals move in response to tax rates…

That is from Jeremy Horpendahl, citing research by…Emanuel Saez.

The post That was then, this is now appeared first on Marginal REVOLUTION.
